data.title: ATS Announces Dates of First Quarter Results Conference Call and Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: ATS Corporation, listed on both TSX and NYSE under ATS, is set to release its financial results for the first quarter ending June 28, 2026, prior to market opening on Thursday, August 06, 2026. Following this, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern on the same day, the Company will conduct a conference call and webcast featuring management's quarterly comments and a session for analysts to ask questions. The webcast, for listening only, will be available at https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/766230709.

data.title: NVIDIA and KAIST Launch Joint AI Research Lab to Accelerate AI Innovation in Korea
data.description: A recent collaboration has been established to enhance the development of the Agentic AI model in Korea. This partnership will offer top-tier AI infrastructure, research grants, internships, and joint appointments. The initiative aims to advance the Agentic AI model through cutting-edge resources. It is set to provide significant support for Korea's AI sector, with a focus on fostering innovation and expertise in this field. The collaboration promises to boost research capabilities and talent development, facilitating the growth of AI technologies.

[Breaking] South Korean government to raise margin requirements for leveraged single-stock products, with early implementation beginning on the 31st.

data.title: Fluent Announces Receipt of Exemptive Relief Relating to Annual General and Special Meeting; Extension of Proxy Deposit Deadline
data.description: On July 23, 2026, FLUENT Corp. (CSE: FNT.U) (OTCQB: CNTMF), a multi-state cannabis company, disclosed updates regarding its proposed acquisition by Vireo Growth Inc. The Ontario Securities Commission granted FLUENT a discretionary exemption from a requirement under Multilateral Instrument 61-101, pertaining to the shareholder meeting on July 28, 2026. This meeting, to be held at 9:30 a.m. in Toronto, will take place at Cassels Brock & Blackwell LLP offices. The acquisition arrangement will be discussed among other agenda items during this event.

data.title: Webcast Alert: Cavco Industries, Inc. Announces Fiscal 2027 First Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call Webcast
data.description: In Phoenix on July 23, 2026, Cavco Industries, Inc. (Nasdaq: CVCO) announced plans to reveal its first quarter earnings for the period ending June 27, 2026 on Thursday, July 30, 2026, after market hours. Senior executives will host a live webcast to discuss the financial results on Friday, July 31, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Faraday Future Highlights Its EAI Robotics at Maker Faire Meetups, Advancing EAI Robot Co-Creation and Developer Ecosystem Growth
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI), a company based in California, recently attended a Maker Faire community meetup in Orange County, CA. At the event, they displayed their latest robotics products for education, security, and various market uses. The showcased product was the FF Master robot, along with their open developer platform. Faraday Future is known for their global Embodied AI ecosystem and is making strides in the robotics industry. The event in Orange County attracted a significant audience and provided a platform for showcasing Faraday Future's innovative technology.

data.title: Pelican Acquisition II Corporation Announces Pricing of $75,000,000 Initial Public Offering
data.description: On July 23, 2026, Pelican Acquisition II Corporation disclosed the pricing of its initial public offering of 7,500,000 units at $10.00 each. The Company, registered as a Cayman Islands exempted entity, stated that the units will be traded on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol “PLCIU” starting from July 24, 2026. Each unit comprises one ordinary share of the Company and one right, with each right granting the holder the entitlement to obtain one-tenth of one ordinary share after the completion of an initial business combination.

data.title: ARBOR Launches COMX-C710 AI Module Powered by AMD Ryzen™ AI Embedded X100 Processors for Robotics and Physical AI Applications
data.description: On July 23, 2026, ARBOR Technology Corp. unveiled its latest COM-HPC module, the COMX-C710. This module is equipped with the latest AMD Ryzen™ AI Embedded X100 Series processors. The COMX-C710 is aimed at industries such as robotics, medical, and industrial automation. The module will be showcased at the upcoming AMD Advancing event.

data.title: Monk Launches Voice Collections, Bringing AI Phone Calls and Callbacks to Accounts Receivable
data.description: Julia, the collections agent for Monk, now has the ability to make outbound collection calls and address inbound Accounts Receivable queries through a special business line. This new feature enables finance teams to utilize the most effective collection method without the need to hire additional staff. To see Voice Collections in action, watch the multimedia demonstration showcasing this innovative solution.

data.title: China Pharma Holdings, Inc. Announces Closing of $5.0 Million Registered Direct Offering
data.description: In Haikou, China, on July 23, 2026, China Pharma Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: CPHI), a specialized pharmaceuticals firm in China, disclosed the completion of its registered direct offering of 2,500,000 shares.

data.title: Sensient Declares Dividend
data.description: In Milwaukee, the Board of Directors of Sensient Technologies Corporation (NYSE: SXT) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.41 per share for its common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on September 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of August 3, 2026. Sensient Technologies Corporation, known for its colors, flavors, and specialty ingredients, is a prominent global producer. Leveraging advanced technologies and a strong worldwide presence, Sensient is a key player in its industry.
